skills.name: view-programs
skills.description: Browse 9 active spa programs (4 paired base rituals + 5 author programs) with durations and prices.

skills.name: view-program-details
skills.description: View detailed information about a specific spa program. URL template: /programs/{slug}/ where slug is one of: zarya-telo, zarya-volosy, sumerki-telo, sumerki-volosy, rodnik, kedr, lada, yav, otzvuk.

skills.name: book-appointment
skills.description: Open the booking form to schedule a spa appointment. Provides date, time selection and contact submission.

skills.name: view-contacts
skills.description: View salon contacts: address (St. Petersburg, Beringa St. 23 bld. 2, Vasilyevsky Island) and Telegram (@Istova_spa).

skills.name: knowledge-summary
skills.description: Read the LLM-friendly summary of the entire site in /llms.txt format (contacts, all programs with prices, concept).
